premiumModalLiveData.description: Funnel analysis (Apps Script ?action=funnel): 126 modal opens → 14 CTA = 11% bottleneck. Root cause: fake hardcoded beach names felt manufactured. Fix: wire sargData+island into PremiumModal. Morning brief card now shows real top-scoring beach + satellite score. Social proof shows live X/Y clean count. Fallback to static copy when sargData not loaded.
premiumModalLiveData.hypothesis: Real live beach names + scores increase perceived credibility → modal→CTA lifts above 15%
